[title] BRICK AND STEEL
[title] FULL RETIRED

[author_marker] Written by

[author_names] Stu Maschwitz

[source_marker] Story by KTM

[draft_date] 1/27/2012

[notes] Next Level Productions
[contact] 1588 Mission Dr.
[contact] Solvang, CA 93463

[scene_heading] EXT. BRICK’S PATIO - DAY

[action] A gorgeous day.  The sun is shining.  But BRICK BRADDOCK, 
[action] retired police detective, is sitting quietly, contemplating -- 
[action] something.

[action] The SCREEN DOOR slides open and DICK STEEL, his former 
[action] partner and fellow retiree, emerges with two cold beers.

[character] STEEL
[dialogue] Beer’s ready!

[character] BRICK
[dialogue] Are they cold?

[character] STEEL
[dialogue] Does a bear crap in the woods?

[action] Steel sits.  They laugh at the dumb joke.

[character] STEEL (CONT’D)
[parenthetical] (beer raised)
[dialogue] To retirement.

[character] BRICK
[dialogue] To retirement.

[action] They drink long and well from the beers.

[action] And then there’s a long beat.
[action] Longer than is funny.
[action] Long enough to be depressing.

[action] The men look at each other.

[character (DUAL)] STEEL
[dialogue (DUAL)] Screw retirement.
[character (DUAL)] BRICK
[dialogue (DUAL)] Screw retirement.

[transition] SMASH CUT TO:

[scene_heading] INT. TRAILER HOME - DAY

[action] This is the home of THE BOY BAND, AKA DAN and JACK.  They too 
[action] are drinking beer, and counting the take from their last 
[action] smash-and-grab.  Money, drugs, and ridiculous props are 
[action] strewn about the table.

[character] JACK
[dialogue] (in Vietnamese, subtitled)
[dialogue] Did you know Brick and Steel are 
[dialogue] retired?

[character] DAN
[dialogue] Then let’s retire them.
[dialogue] Permanently.

[action] Jack begins to argue vociferously in Vietnamese (?), But 
[action] mercifully we...

[transition] CUT TO:

[scene_heading] EXT. BRICK’S POOL - DAY

[action] Steel, in the middle of a heated phone call:

[character] STEEL
[dialogue] They’re coming out of the woodwork!
[parenthetical] (pause)
[dialogue] No, everybody we’ve put away!
[parenthetical] (pause)
[dialogue] Point Blank Sniper?

[subheading] SNIPER SCOPE POV

[action] From what seems like only INCHES AWAY.  Steel’s face FILLS 
[action] the  Leupold Mark 4  scope.

[character] STEEL
[dialogue] The man’s a myth!

[action] Steel turns and looks straight into the cross-hairs.

[character] STEEL (CONT’D)
[parenthetical] (oh crap)
[dialogue] Hello...

[transition] CUT TO:

[subheading] OPENING TITLES

[character] BRICK BRADDOCK
[centered] & DICK STEEL IN

[centered] BRICK & STEEL
[centered] FULL RETIRED

[transition] SMASH CUT TO:

[scene_heading] EXT. WOODEN SHACK - DAY

[action] COGNITO, the criminal mastermind, is SLAMMED against the 
[action] wall.
[page_number] 2.

[character] COGNITO
[dialogue] Woah woah woah, Brick and Steel!

[action] Sure enough, it’s Brick and Steel, roughing up their favorite 
[action] usual suspect.

[character] COGNITO (CONT’D)
[dialogue] What is it you want with me, DICK?

[action] Steel SMACKS him.

[character] STEEL
[dialogue] Who’s coming after us?

[character] COGNITO
[dialogue] Everyone’s coming after you mate!  
[dialogue] Scorpio, The Boy Band, Sparrow, 
[dialogue] Point Blank Sniper...

[action] As he rattles off the long list, Brick and Steel share a 
[action] look.  This is going to be BAD.

[transition] CUT TO:

[scene_heading] INT. GARAGE - DAY

[action] BRICK and STEEL get into Mom’s PORSCHE, Steel at the wheel.  
[action] They pause for a beat, the gravity of the situation catching 
[action] up with them.

[character] BRICK
[dialogue] This is everybody we've ever put 
[dialogue] away.

[character] STEEL
[parenthetical] (starting the engine)
[dialogue] So much for retirement!

[action] They speed off.  To destiny!

[transition] CUT TO:

[scene_heading] EXT. PALATIAL MANSION - DAY

[action] An EXTREMELY HANDSOME MAN drinks a beer.  Shirtless, 
[action] unfortunately.

[action] His minion approaches offscreen:

[character] MINION
[dialogue] We found Brick and Steel!
[page_number] 3.

[character] HANDSOME MAN
[dialogue] I want them dead.  DEAD!

[action] Beer flies.

[transition] BURN TO PINK.

[centered] THE END
[page_number] 4.
